race.comment: An open race to end the day. MR BLING (9) got back to winning ways in impressive fashion when sitting handy over 2200m at Ascot last time out, winning by 2.3L. The wide draw is a query, but he does possess some early speed. If he can work across from out wide, then he'll be hard to hold out once again. THOR'S ANGEL (10) was too good over 2200m at Northam when scoring a dominant maiden win from up on the speed. She comes through a couple of handy form races prior to that as well. Can press on from the draw and continue her winning ways. TRIBAL RULER (11) wasn't far away in a Saturday race over the mile last start and now rises to 2100m. The inside draw should see him get every chance to run out the extra trip and he's not to be discounted. AURORA QUEEN (7) gets the blinkers on first time today and is not to be discounted. SHAULA (3) is next best stepping up in distance today.
